features: FIRMER AND BRIGHTER: This undereye skincare cream is designed to reduce crow's feet, wrinkles and puffiness, creating a brighter and younger-looking complexion

VISIBLE RESULTS: After just 2 weeks of using this firming eye cream, crow’s feet improved for 84% of women.* After 4 weeks, visible radiance and youthful appearance around the eye area were reported**
INNOVATIVE FORMULA: The anti-wrinkle eye cream is powered by pure Q10, creatine and hyaluronic acid to boost skin's regeneration and reduce wrinkles from within*
HOW TO APPLY: Every morning and evening, apply a small amount of the NIVEA eye cream to the entire eye contour then smooth into skin, moving from the inner corner to the outer corner
CLINICALLY TESTED: NIVEA skincare is always dermatologically tested for skin compatibility and visible results. This cream has been tested and approved for use on sensitive undereye skin
description: Product Description NIVEA Q10 Anti-Wrinkle Power Firming Eye Cream (15ml) - Eliminate fine lines and dark circles Rejuvenate and brighten dark undereye circles with this essential eye cream from NIVEA. Boasting a selection of lush ingredients like pure Q10, creatine and hyaluronic acid, this cream is proven to banish fine lines and circles from the inside out, reducing puffiness and restoring a youthful glow. Users have reported a visible improvement in crow's feet after just 2 weeks of use,* and a visible improvement in skin radiance and appearance after 4 weeks. Product Benefits: NIVEA Q10 eye cream With pure Q10, creatine and hyaluronic acid Reduces puffiness, fine lines, crow's feet and dark circles Refreshed and youthful-looking skin Dermatologically tested 15ml *Expert grading, 2 weeks study, 31 women, 2019 Ingredients 10x more creatine than Q10plus Safety Warning Avoid direct contact with eyes. See more
